name: Busy Day Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. CRUMBLE BEEF INTO A LARGE BOWL AND ADD SALT.
2. SPRINKLE WITH CRACKER CROUSHS AND MILK, THEN LET STAND FOR SEVERAL MINUTES UNTIL THE CRUMBS ARE SOFT.
3. BLEND TOGETHER ALL INGREDIENTS UNTIL COMBINED, MIXING IN EGG, ONION, SAGE, THYME, NUTMEG, AND PEPPER WELL.
4. SHAPE INTO 4 LOAVES AND PLACE ON A FOIL-LINED BAKING SHEET ABOUT 3 INCHES APART.
5. MIX TOGETHER THE BROWN SUGAR, KETCHUP, GINGER, GARLIC SALT, SOY SAUCE, AND MUSTARD.
6. SPREAD THIS Mixture OVER THE TOP OF THE LOAVES.
7. BAKE FOR 35 MINUTES AT 350 DEGREES.
